sql_array: CREATE TABLE snowflake_test (id UInt64, created_at DateTime64(3));
UPDATE snowflake_test SET created_at = snowflakeIDToDateTime64(7204436857747984384) WHERE id = 7204436857747984384;
SELECT id, snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id) AS generated_time FROM snowflake_test;
SELECT snowflakeIDToDateTime64(id, 1288834974657) AS twitter_time FROM snowflake_test;
